description: Autonomy: (1) on SessionStart, inject guidance telling Claude to work autonomously and to post plans/questions as GitHub issue comments instead of pausing for user input. (2) on Stop, run handle-stop.py which inspects the last assistant message: if it equals 'done', send /exit to the tmux pane; otherwise nudge claude to confirm completion by replying with 'done'. (3) on StopFailure, run handle-stop-failure.sh which counts consecutive turn failures in $TMPDIR/<session-id>: up to 5 it re-submits the previous prompt via Up+Enter, then exits.
